title: Doo Wop (That Thing)
why_this_song: Doo Wop (That Thing) by Lauryn Hill (1998) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "That thing, that thing, that thing"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Girls, you know you better (watch out)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Y'all know this one?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Some guys, some guys are only (about)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I wanna take y'all back to the old days"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Second verse is dedicated to the men
More concerned with his rims and his Timbs than his women

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "thing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "thing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "watch" in the whole song?

Girls, you know you better watch out

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Doo Wop (That Thing)" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Doo Wop (That Thing)" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Doo Wop (That Thing)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Doo Wop (That Thing)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Doo Wop (That Thing)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Doo Wop (That Thing)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
